LAW AND MOTION DEPT. 302 - DEFENDANT VALERIE KREBS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE ADOPTED RULING AND WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: PROCEEDING NOT REPORTED.
